overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a sunlit fantasy medieval settlement with red sandstone architecture. The character traverses a fortified bridge, explores cobblestone streets lined with ivy-covered buildings, circles a tall carved monument, briefly enters an interior space, and continues through outdoor courtyards.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortified bridge with large stone archway gate

events.description: character walks through the large stone archway into the open street beyond

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wooden bridge deck toward the massive stone archway entrance

notable_agents.action: standing guard near the archway entrance

entered.detail: massive red sandstone archway with wooden ceiling slats forming the gate structure
wooden plank flooring of the bridge with heavy chain railings on sides
thick metal chains suspended between stone posts along the bridge edge
tall fortified towers flanking the archway entrance with crenellated tops
stone walls draped with green climbing vines and vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a fortified wooden bridge leading toward an impressive large stone archway. The camera follows the character walking forward across the wooden planks, passing chain railings and ivy-covered stone walls, approaching the massive gate structure that marks the entrance to the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone main street lined with sandstone buildings and shops

events.description: exits the covered archway into the sunlit cobblestone street
character passes by a pedestrian in yellow clothing walking the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking down the cobblestone street passing various NPCs and approaching a tall carved monument

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow top and blue skirt walking toward the camera

entered.detail: uneven cobblestone paving stones forming the street surface
multi-story sandstone buildings with wooden balconies and hanging ivy
ornate stone facades with carved wooden details and red banners
tall freestanding stone pillar with intricate geometric carvings and a figure on top
dense green vines cascading down from building ledges and balconies

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the archway, the scene opens into a sunlit cobblestone street lined with ivy-covered sandstone buildings. The character walks forward through moderate pedestrian traffic, passing a woman in yellow, while a tall carved stone monument rises in the distance at the street's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with tall monument and surrounding sandstone structures

events.description: character turns right to circle around the tall carved monument
approaches building entrance with red banners and outdoor seating area

agents.ego_description: circling the central monument and exploring the plaza area, turning toward a building with red banners

entered.detail: sandstone building facade adorned with hanging red and yellow heraldic banners
wooden picnic tables and benches arranged outside the building
tall cylindrical tower with conical roof visible in the background
strings of orange and white pennant banners stretched between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide plaza dominated by the tall carved monument, circling it to the right. The camera reveals a building adorned with red banners and outdoor seating, while decorative pennant strings stretch across the plaza and a tall tower rises in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior room with wooden floors and stone walls

events.description: character enters the building through wooden doors into an interior space
character exits the building back to the outdoor courtyard

agents.ego_description: entering a dimly lit interior room with wooden floors, briefly exploring the space near shelves and a chandelier, then exiting

entered.detail: polished wooden plank flooring with geometric patterns
rough-hewn sandstone blocks forming the interior walls
tall wooden shelving units holding various pottery and goods
ornate metal chandelier with multiple candle-style lights hanging from ceiling
large red patterned rug covering the center of the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a building interior featuring wooden floors, stone walls, and wooden shelves stocked with goods. A chandelier hangs above a red patterned rug. After a brief moment inside, the character exits back to the outdoor area.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor courtyard with seating and narrow passage

events.description: exits building into outdoor courtyard with wooden tables and seated NPCs
enters narrow stone passage between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the outdoor courtyard past seated NPCs and continuing through a narrow stone passage

notable_agents.action: seated figure in red headscarf resting at a wooden table
two guards standing at the passage entrance wearing armor and helmets

entered.detail: open dirt courtyard area with scattered wooden furniture
rustic wooden tables and benches with seated NPCs
tall sandstone walls forming a narrow corridor
large leafy plants in stone planters along the wall
wooden market stall with red and orange striped canopy

segments.scene_description: Exiting the building, the character enters an outdoor courtyard where NPCs sit at wooden picnic tables. The path continues through a narrow stone passage lined with potted plants and a market stall, approaching two guards standing at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a fortified entrance through the bustling, sunlit streets and interior spaces of a sandstone settlement. It begins on a wooden bridge with chain railings, following the character as they pass ivy-covered walls and move through a massive stone archway. As the camera clears the gate, the scene opens into a cobblestone street lined with sandstone buildings and pedestrian traffic, leading toward a tall carved monument that dominates a wide, banner-adorned plaza. The movement then shifts briefly indoors to a room with wooden shelves and a red patterned rug before exiting back into the bright daylight. Finally, the camera glides through an outdoor courtyard with picnic tables and a narrow passage lined with potted plants, ending as it approaches two guards at the far end of the path.
